title: Scope a PubSub topic by tenant id
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/announcements_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.AnnouncementsLive). In mount/3, read %{"org_id" => org_id} from session and subscribe (when connected?) to "announcements:org:#{org_id}" — not to "announcements". The topic string must include the tenant scope. Return {:ok, assign(socket, org_id: org_id, announcements: [])}.
tier_rationale: Known canonical fix: tenant-scoped topic string. Simple once recognized.
research_citation: georgeguimaraes/claude-code-elixir phoenix-thinking: 'Unscoped topics leak data between tenants'
